title: hieracium × bifurcum subsp. anthelaephilum
intro: Hieracium × bifurcum subsp. anthelaephilum is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and deeply cut, toothed leaves. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium × bifurcum subsp. anthelaephilum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
